cisa:PE:1.0.0.name: Publicly Exposed
cisa:PE:1.0.0.definition: Denotes whether the asset is accessible to unauthenticated or untrusted entities via public networks.

values.name: No
values.definition: The asset is not accessible to unauthenticated or untrusted entities via public networks, such as the internet, regardless of its physical or logical location.

values.name: Yes
values.definition: The asset is accessible to unauthenticated or untrusted entities via public networks, such as the internet, regardless of its physical or logical location.

cisa:KEV:1.0.0.name: In KEV
cisa:KEV:1.0.0.definition: Denotes whether a vulnerability is in the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) list.

values.name: No
values.definition: Vulnerability is not listed in KEV.

ssvc:A:2.0.0.name: Automatable
ssvc:A:2.0.0.definition: Can an attacker reliably automate creating exploitation events for this vulnerability?

values.name: No
values.definition: Attackers cannot reliably automate steps 1-4 of the kill chain for this vulnerability. These steps are (1) reconnaissance, (2) weaponization, (3) delivery, and (4) exploitation.

values.name: Yes
values.definition: Attackers can reliably automate steps 1-4 of the kill chain.

ssvc:TI:1.0.0.name: Technical Impact
ssvc:TI:1.0.0.definition: The technical impact of the vulnerability.

values.name: Partial
values.definition: The exploit gives the adversary limited control over, or information exposure about, the behavior of the software that contains the vulnerability. Or the exploit gives the adversary an importantly low stochastic opportunity for total control.

values.name: Total
values.definition: The exploit gives the adversary total control over the behavior of the software, or it gives total disclosure of all information on the system that contains the vulnerability.

cisa:BOD2604:1.0.0.name: CISA BOD 26-04 Remediation Timelines
cisa:BOD2604:1.0.0.definition: The CISA BOD 26-04 outcome group of remediation timelines for agencies to follow.

values.name: Fix on system upgrade
values.definition: The vulnerability should be remediated the next time the vulnerable asset receives a scheduled major upgrade or rebuild.

values.name: 3 days & forensic investigation
values.definition: Remediate within 3 days and carry out a forensic triage of the asset to assess whether the system is compromised.
